metadata.name: Create Social Media Graphics for Game Day

description: A team's social media manager needs to create graphics for game day, including a 'starting lineup' graphic.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the official starting lineup for today's game.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the list of starting players.
Agent chooses the correct template from a library.

nodes.task_description: Populate the template with the player names and headshots.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent automatically generates the final graphic.

nodes.task_description: Post the graphic to the team's social media accounts.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully posts the lineup graphic to Twitter and Instagram.
